steps.title: Supply subject and verb
steps.content: After the introductory phrase naming George Tsebelis, the sentence needs a complete clause about Spain's constitution. The blank must supply both a singular subject and the linking verb before 105th.

steps.title: Reject wrong forms
steps.content: Choice A and Choice D are possessive forms, so they cannot create the clause. Choice C supplies a plural subject and verb, which does not agree with the singular constitution. The answer is B.
